title: Sorr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sorr''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]] near the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He reassigned [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] to the mission to uncover the motives of the prophet [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1stm}}
